description: The ProtoFluxImpulseProxy component interacts with the ProtoFlux tool and ProtoFlux in general to act as the relay for attaching impulses to ProtoFlux nodes.

fields.Node: The node this is proxying an impulse for
fields.ElementName: The name of the element that this is attaching an impulse to.
fields.Index: The index of the property to make an impulse for.
fields.ConnectPoint: the slot to attach the wire end being connected.
fields.Wire: The wire being attached to this impulse proxy
fields.NodeImpulse: The impulse value field to target.
fields.ImpulseType: the type of impulse this is for.
